# GitHub Discussions Configuration
#
# Enable at: Repository Settings → Features → Discussions
#
# Categories to create:
#
# 📢 Announcements (announcement format)
#   - Release notes, breaking changes, roadmap updates
#   - Only maintainers can post
#
# 💬 General (open-ended format)
#   - Introductions, general discussion, off-topic
#
# 💡 Ideas (open-ended format)
#   - Feature requests, enhancement proposals
#   - Community voting on ideas
#
# ❓ Q&A (question/answer format)
#   - How-to questions, troubleshooting
#   - Mark answers as accepted
#
# 🔌 Plugins (open-ended format)
#   - Plugin announcements, plugin help
#   - Plugin development discussion
#
# 🎉 Show & Tell (open-ended format)
#   - Share your AgentCost setup
#   - Dashboard screenshots, cost savings stories
#   - Plugin showcases
